caption: A news broadcast titled "PLUS POLITICS" features a male presenter wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and red tie, speaking from a studio with a blue and green graphic background. To his right, a smaller inset window shows a man wearing a traditional red cap, identified by on-screen text as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI" and "POLITICAL ANALYST" located in "LAGOS." A banner at the top of the inset window reads "ON THE PHONE." Below the presenter, a large white ticker displays the text "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The bottom of the screen includes channel information such as "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308," along with social media handles and a YouTube link "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE." Across the sequence of frames, the visual composition remains static, with the presenter and the remote analyst maintaining their positions and appearances.
